title: Winner - Global FinTech Hackathon
description: Led an engineering team of 4 to design and build an AI-powered financial auditing tool, winning first place out of 180 international teams.

title: Author - 'Scaling WebSockets' Whitepaper
description: Published a detailed technical paper on scaling socket connections to over 1 million concurrent users on AWS ECS, featured in Tech Journal.

title: Top Contributor - Open Source Go Frameworks
description: Acknowledged as a top 5% outside code contributor to a highly popular open-source Go routing framework.
